scripts.check: biome check . && oxlint packages e2e vitest.config.ts vitest.shared.ts --type-aware && bun run typecheck && bun run test && knip
scripts.ci: biome ci . && oxlint packages e2e vitest.config.ts vitest.shared.ts --type-aware --deny-warnings && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test:coverage && knip
scripts.lint: biome check . && oxlint packages e2e vitest.config.ts vitest.shared.ts --type-aware
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write . && oxlint packages e2e vitest.config.ts vitest.shared.ts --type-aware --fix
scripts.test: turbo run test && bun --bun vitest run --config e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: turbo run test:coverage && bun --bun vitest run --coverage --config e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.root.json && tsgo --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json && turbo run typecheck
